channel.title: NativePlant on Nature Works
channel.description: Recent content in NativePlant on Nature Works

item.title: Benjamin Vogt & Fellowship of the Trees videos
item.description: The two videos have been published! Putting here for reference: http://localhost:1313/blog/230126-videos/

item.title: One screenshot to change the way you think about native plants
item.description:
Do you know how many bugs the Common Oak supports? This screenshot from the ‘Database of Insects and their Food Plants’ took my breath away

The Database of Insects and their Food Plants is a fantastic resource created by the Biological Records Centre that lists native plants and which inverterbrates they are hosts for. http://localhost:1313/blog/screenshot-think-native-plants/
